description: Create a professional, printable science fair judge score sheet with proper formatting, merged cells, and borders, including all required fields for manual data collection. Save the document to /home/ga/Documents/science_fair_score_sheet.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Create a science fair judge score sheet form in LibreOffice Calc. Include fields for student name and project number, four scoring categories (Creativity, Scientific Method, Presentation Quality, Clarity of Explanation) each worth 0-25 points with comment space, a total score field (out of 100), and judge information fields (name, date, signature). Use proper formatting with merged cells, borders, and adequate spacing for handwriting. The form must fit on one printed page.
